title: Missouri Revised Statutes § 46.104 - Lawrence
text:
46.104.  Lawrence. — Beginning at the southeast corner of section twenty-five of township twenty-six, range twenty-five, west; thence north with the range line between ranges twenty-four and twenty-five to the northeast corner of township twenty-nine, range twenty-five, west; thence west with the township line between townships twenty-nine and thirty to the northwest corner of section one of township twenty-nine, range twenty-nine, west; thence south with the subdivisional lines to the southwest corner of section twenty-five, township twenty-six, range twenty-nine, west; thence east with the subdivisional lines to the place of beginning.
(RSMo 1939 § 13626) 
Prior revisions: 1929 § 11967; 1919 § 9369; 1909 § 3586
